docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MONTERO, SAUL JONATHAN IBANEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAUL JONATHAN IBANEZ MONTERO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CURTIS E. A. KARNOW; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
